creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
On Thu, Jan 17, 2013 at 11:50 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of deskutils/parcellite,
>
> Please note that PR ports/175371 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/175371


I approve.

Thanks,

Joseph
